title: Curaleaf Holdings Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Curaleaf Holdings (OTC) has a consensus rating of Strong Buy which is based on 3 buy ratings, 0 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. The 8 analysts providing 12-month price projections for Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. shares anticipate an average target of $4.05, ranging from a low estimate of $3.15 to a high estimate of $5.00. Another source reports Curaleaf Holdings (OTC)'s 12-month average price target is 3.75. Curaleaf Holdings (OTC) has 68.28% upside potential, based on the analysts' average price target. Next quarter's earnings estimate for CURLF is -$0.07 with a range of -$0.09 to -$0.03. The consensus rating for Curaleaf is Strong Buy, based on insights from 5 analysts. 7 analysts recommend buying the stock, 0 suggest selling, and 0 recommend holding.
